title: viguieranthus umbilicus
intro: Viguieranthus umbilicus, also known as the umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. Viguieranthus umbilicus is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in traditional herbal preparations, such as salves and ointments.
